description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is surrounded by a large, manicured lawn and features a spacious patio area with outdoor seating. The property is bordered by a wooden fence on one side and a paved driveway or walkway on the other, leading to a possible parking or garden area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The rear of the bungalow opens to a terrace with additional landscaping and seating, while the front is oriented toward a paved area that could serve as a driveway or entrance. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with white exterior walls and green landscaping providing contrast.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white walls, large asymmetrical windows, and expansive green lawns, featuring a patio and fenced garden area.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated angle, highlighting the front lawn, patio, and the main entrance area with visible outdoor seating and landscaping.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the front, emphasizing the flat roof, large windows, and the broad green lawn leading up to the entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, revealing the terrace, additional green space, and the paved area adjacent to the building.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the back, showcasing the terrace, garden area, and the fenced section with trees and outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
